page_metadata.biotools__summary: Database of predicted and experimentally determined protein-protein interactions (PPI) for yeast and human. Predicted interactions in the database are determined using a Bayesian framework that combines structural, functional, evolutionary and expression information.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Database of predicted and experimentally determined protein-protein interactions (PPI) for yeast and human. Predicted interactions in the database are determined using a Bayesian framework that combines structural, functional, evolutionary and expression information.
